chapter_title.ar: باب الْفَيْ‏ءِ وَ الْأَنْفَالِ وَ تَفْسِيرِ الْخُمُسِ وَ حُدُودِهِ وَ مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 130 – Al-Fey (Military gains) and Al-Anfal (Non-military gains) and the interpretation of Al-Khums (A fifth of military gains) and its limits and what it is Obligated upon

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (287/ 6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (287/ 6)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ الله (عَلَيْهِ السَّلام) عَنِ الْعَنْبَرِ وَغَوْصِ اللُّؤْلُؤِ فَقَالَ (عَلَيْهِ السَّلام) عَلَيْهِ الْخُمُسُ.

en.sarwar: 28. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayar from Hammad from al-Halabi who has said the following. “I asked abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) about the corral and diving for pearls. The Imam (a.s.) said, “There is al-Khums due on them.”
